name: ÖPNV Deutschland
description: Nationwide German public transit (S-Bahn, U-Bahn, Tram, Bus, regional): stations, departures, arrivals, journey planning via EFA/DELFI (openservice-test.vrr.de test endpoint, free, no key)

tools.name: search_station
tools.description: Search for a public transit stop by name

tools.name: get_departures
tools.description: Get upcoming departures from a public transit stop

tools.name: get_arrivals
tools.description: Get upcoming arrivals at a public transit stop

tools.name: search_journey
tools.description: Search for journeys between two stops

author: freddy-schuetz
